author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Write a bounded BDC error/erasure model note for reboot-line memory, transmission, and archival reasoning.
research_question: Can BDC define a scientifically honest distinction between corruption, loss, burst defects, and address defects before specifying the new memory architecture?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the diversity-policy note, so that memory is not treated in isolation from reboot-line system dynamics.

tests_required: model note includes corruption vs erasure distinction
model note includes burst and address defect classes
